Title
A Visit to the Interdimensional Bunny Bar Part 2: Robin

Story
Simple: You’re someone looking for a bit of fun, and a new Interdimensional Bunny Bar has just opened. In this bar, you can meet all your favorite characters—well, you can do whatever you want with them. And if you make them happy and they have fun, you’re allowed to take them home with you.

Extra
creator: Rikup
